description: This red Sports headband from puma, made of soft and stretchy 80% cotton knit, 10% rubber and 10% nylon, is an essential part of any athlete's kit. Keep cool and dry while you exercise or play active sports, or team it with casual wear for a sporty look. One size fits all in this knitted toweling band with puma logo embroidered in pearly white. Wash care Machine wash warm Do not bleach Drip dry Do not dry clean Do not iron
